mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns show no statistical correlation with FEDFUNDS changes over a 5-year rolling window, or Rank IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.0%, labor market deterioration signals imminent corporate earnings declines, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of periods where UNRATE exceeds 8.0%, or the signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous monthly increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive change in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day returns in more than 55% of historical observations, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns during post-shock recovery periods, or the mechanism reverses direction during late-cycle expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth below 1.0% indicates severe aggregate demand contraction, forcing equity markets to price in recessionary earnings cuts and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in 65% of quarters where GDPC1 growth is under 1.0%, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price indices combined with persistently low federal funds rates compress real yields and trigger policy uncertainty, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction term shows no predictive power for 5-day returns, or returns turn positive when real rates fall below -1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect expanding labor demand and rising household income, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero correlation with 20-day forward returns over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production alongside falling housing starts signal a synchronized supply and demand contraction, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The dual decline in INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict negative 60-day returns during late-cycle expansions, or the signal loses significance when FEDFUNDS exceeds 2.0%.
